title: ilex stapfiana
intro: Ilex stapfiana, also known as Chinese holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ilex stapfiana include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herb for treating a range of ailments. Herbal preparations of Ilex stapfiana include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal products.
